svg.title: Cruise Set To Longitudinal Signal Flow

g.text: Cruise Set To Longitudinal Signal Flow
Select cruise mode and target speed
clamp command and apply speed-limit cap
update brake response only if brake pedal or assist floor applies
Cruise set and vehicle speed move in one longitudinal chain
1. Driver sets cruise mode and set-speed
2. SCC owns cruise state and set-speed normalization
4. ESC follows downstream brake dynamics only when needed
5. CLU and panel show live set-speed and vehicle speed
